case_title: ZHONG QIU CUI VS. RU HAI LIANG

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY CUI, ZHONG QIU LIANG, RU HAI

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINITFF. PLAINTIFF ZHONG QIU CUI IS PRESENT. ASSISTED BY AMANDA PEETERS MANDARIN COURT INTERPRETER. DEFENDANT RU HAI LIANG IS PRESENT. ASSISTED BY REBECCA CHAU CANTONESE COURT INTERPRETER. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE OF PLAINTIFFS CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANNE PEEBLES; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,250.00 FILED BY CUI, ZHONG QIU AS TO DEFENDANT LIANG, RU HAI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-27-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MARCH 7, 2017 AT 3:30 (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-07-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-02-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ZHONG QIU CUI IS PRESENT. ASSISTED BY CONNIE CHEN MANDARIN COURT INTERPRETER. DEFENDANT RU HAI LIANG IS PRESENT. ASSISTED BY BANNIE CHOW CANTONESE COURT INTERPRETER. DEFENDANT DOES NOT WAIVE SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/3/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CUI, ZHONG QIU ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-27-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-07-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ZHONG QIU CUI WITH SELF-PROVIDED/CERTIFIED (#0179) MANDARIN INTERPRETER. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT RU HAI LIANG WITH COURT PROVIDED CANTONESE INTERPRETER BANNIE CHOW. DEFENDANTS WERE NOT AWARE OF THIS CASE AS THEY WERE PRESENT FOR CASE # CSM-16-853487 SET AT THE SAME TIME. PLAINTIFF IS TO SERVE HIS CLAIM TO DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO THE ORDER SIGNED ON 12/03/21 BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG.
